info.name: SmartERP â€” Procurement
info.description:
Procurement backend API collection.

Setup:
  1. Set base_url = http://localhost:8001 (or your port)
  2. Run 'Login' â€” token is auto-saved to {{token}}
  3. Run requests in order within each folder. Create requests auto-save IDs to collection variables (lastVendorId, lastProductId, etc.) for use in approve/reject requests.

Note: Create Vendor uses email 'admin@smart.com'. If you get 409 (already exists), manually set {{lastVendorCode}} from the DB.

request.description: Creates a new vendor with INVITED status.

formdata.value: {"name":"Global Tech Innovations","nameOfOwner":"Anil Kumar","email":"info@globaltech.com","designation":"CEO","category":"Services","typesOfBusiness":"Private Limited","addressLine1":"123 Tech Park, Silicon Valley Layout","addressLine2":"Electronic City, Phase 1","state":"Karnataka","district":"Bengaluru Urban","city":"Bengaluru","pinCode":"560100","gstDetails":[{"state":"Karnataka","gstNumber":"29ABCDE1234F1Z5","gstCertificate":"gstCert0"}]}

formdata.description: GST certificate for entry 0 â€” field name must match gstDetails[0].gstCertificate
Required if typesOfBusiness is 'Private Limited' or 'LLP'

request.description: Multipart/form-data â€” 'data' field is a JSON string, all other fields are file uploads. Select actual files for each file field before sending.
Returns {pagination, vendors}. Use status/search query params to filter.
Fetches full application details by vendor UUID.
Bulk approve. vendorIds is an array of UUIDs.

body.raw:
{
  "vendorCode": "{{lastVendorCode}}",
  "productName": "Safety Helmet",
  "category": "Safety Equipment",
  "subcategory": "Head Protection",
  "price": 250.00,
  "hsnCode": "65119010",
  "isTaxExempt": false,
  "gstRate": 18,
  "deliveryDays": 3,
  "deliveryCost": 50.00,
  "uom": "PCS",
  "description": "ISI marked safety helmet"
}

item.name: EP55 Get Product Bulk Upload Template

exec: console.log('User sites count:', j.results.length, '| first:', j.results[0]?.siteName, '| saved siteId:', j.results[0]?.siteId);
console.log('Products in catalog:', j.results.length, '| first:', j.results[0]?.productName);

request.description: Returns indent history for a site. Spec #8.6. Fields: siteId, trackingNo, requestDate, siteBudget, value, status, balance. Use real siteId (UUID from user-sites or 'siteA' for test data).
Items use productCode (looked up from DB for price/name). Category: 'Regular' or 'Extra Material'. Response: {message, trackingNo, status}.
Path param is trackingNo (e.g. IND/2026/00001). Rich detail response with products, totals.
PH edits an indent. Only allowed in PENDING_PH/RM_APPROVAL. Body: {branchGst, requestCategory, narration, products[{productCode, quantity}]}. Returns full detail.

Bulk approve. PH approval auto-creates POs grouped by vendor (status â†’ PO_CREATED). RM approval moves to PENDING_PH_APPROVAL. Response includes poNumbers. Auto-saves first PO number to {{lastPoNumber}}.
trackingNo in body (not path) because tracking numbers contain slashes.

query.description: Filter by requestor â€” includes _indentDetailsPayload with items for GRN form

request.description:
Paginated PO list. Three views via optional filters:
- No filter: PH view (includes dcNumber, dcDate, signedDcISmartUrl)
- vendorCode: Vendor view (only that vendor's POs)
- requestorEmail: Requestor view (POs from their indents, includes _indentDetailsPayload with items for GRN form)

Multipart/form-data. 'data' is a JSON string with: deliveryType (Hand/Courier), courierName, podNumber, status (In Transit/Delivered/Not Delivered), dateOfDelivery (ISO), reason.

File fields (required when status=Delivered): podImage, signedPod, signedDc.

Validations: future dateOfDelivery rejected; Delivered requires all 3 files + podNumber + dateOfDelivery; Courier requires courierName; Out-of-TAT requires reason.

formdata.description: Photo of proof of delivery (JPEG/PNG, required for Delivered)
Signed POD document (PDF, required for Delivered)
Signed Delivery Challan (PDF, required for Delivered)

request.description: Delivered status requires: dateOfDelivery, podNumber, podImage file, signedPod file, signedDc file. Select actual files in Postman before sending.
Download PO document. type: po_pdf, po_excel, dc_pdf. Currently returns 501 (PDF generation not implemented).

Multipart/form-data. 'data' JSON: items (itemId, receivedQuantity, isAccepted), predefinedComment, comments (required if predefinedComment=OTHER), requestorEmail.

Required file: signedDc (PDF). Optional: photos (up to 2 images).

Backend looks up item names and ordered quantities from PO items. Sets PO status to GRN_SUBMITTED.

query.description: Filter export by PO number, status, or site

request.description: Export POs to Excel. Optional search param filters results to match list view.

formdata.description: Required: PDF/JPG/PNG of the invoice bill
